judge_reason: Description A reads the bottom alphanumeric as handwritten '62-83894-164' while Description B reads it as a stamped red string, creating a direct contradiction on the nature of the same visual element.
original_image_tags: Two hole-punch marks visible at top of page, flanking the "RESTRICTED" stamp.
Handwritten note in red ink in lower left margin, written vertically: "additional copies behind file."
Handwritten annotation in blue ink in bottom center margin: "62-83894-164"
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned typewritten memo page titled “UNCONVENTIONAL AIRCRAFT,” marked “RESTRICTED,” dated 15 February 1949, with handwritten annotations and stamps near the bottom.*
